"[40] FOR CLARIFICATION -- RP SAW 3 MALES LSW ALL BLK- SHE BELIEVES WERE INVLVD IN TC - GET INTO A WHI GMC OR SIM- UNK 28 - VEH DROVE DOWN STUTSMAN - TURNED AROUND - ONE MALE POSS GOT OOV AND WALKED EB STUTSMAN AND THEN DISAPPEARED - UNK IF THEY GOT BAKC IN THE VEH OR ARE STILL ON FOOT ITA - THE VEH THEN DROVE BACK UP TO THE I/S OF STUTSMAN X EASTSIDE CALPELLA AND BLACKED OUT - STILL 97 [Shared]"
"[36] [Notification] [CHP]-WHI VEH WITH INVLVD MALES THAT LEFT THE SCENE IS STUTSMAN AT THE I/S OF EASTSIDE CALPELLA BLACKED OUT NOW - ITA MAILBOXES [Shared]"
